The Fall Guy (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $92,900,355Details
International Box Office $88,359,783
Worldwide Box Office $181,260,138
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,934,186
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,539,058
Total $5,473,244
Further financial details...

Synopsis

He’s a stuntman, and like everyone in the stunt community, he gets blown up, shot, crashed, thrown through windows and dropped from the highest of heights, all for our entertainment. And now, fresh off an almost career-ending accident, this working-class hero has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job. What could possibly go right?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,747,035 (29.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.35 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,002 opening theaters/4,008 max. theaters, 5.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $98,239,452

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 3rd, 2024 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: March 1st, 2024 (Wide), released as The Fall Guy (Каскадьорът) (Bulgaria)
April 24th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
April 24th, 2024 (Wide), released as Kaskadöör (Estonia)
April 24th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
April 24th, 2024 (Wide) (Sweden)
Video Release: May 21st, 2024 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for action and violence, drug content and some strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2796 (cert #54591), 8/16/2023)
Running Time: 126 minutes
Film festival: South by Southwest Film Festival 2024
Filming location (country): Australia

Synopsis

He’s a stuntman, and like everyone in the stunt community, he gets blown up, shot, crashed, thrown through windows and dropped from the highest of heights, all for our entertainment. And now, fresh off an almost career-ending accident, this working-class hero has to track down a missing movie star, solve a conspiracy and try to win back the love of his life while still doing his day job. What could possibly go right?
